description_long: This object is a tall, cylindrical traffic control post, primarily colored in a muted orange or yellowish-brown hue. The post is mounted on a wide, black, circular base that appears sturdy and designed for stability, likely made of heavy-duty plastic or rubber. There are a few small, protruding black fixtures or bolts near the top and midsection, possibly for mounting or locking purposes. The surface of the post is smooth, with some visible text or markings running vertically along one side in a contrasting color. The top of the post is flat and capped, with no visible openings or attachments. The overall condition appears clean and well-maintained, with no visible damage or significant wear.
description: A tall, cylindrical orange traffic post with a wide black base and vertical text markings, featuring a smooth surface and sturdy construction.
description_view_0: Front view shows the vertical text in a contrasting color and a small black fixture near the top.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the cylindrical shape, the black base, and a horizontal black band or fixture around the upper section.
description_view_2: This angle highlights the smooth, uninterrupted surface and another small black fixture protruding from the side.
description_view_3: Rear view displays the plain cylindrical body with the text partially visible along the side and the black base clearly shown.
attribute_reflective_stripes: No reflective stripes are present on the object.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat, solid, and capped in black, with no attachments or openings.
attribute_base_design: The base is wide, circular, and black, appearing thick and stable, likely weighted for stability with a smooth finish.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: Vertical text is visible on one side in a contrasting color, reading 'CORE CITY'.
attribute_condition: The object appears new and clean, with no visible wear, fading, or damage.
